title: Ant Design CLI local package-managed spike
citation: Local package-managed Ant Design CLI spike, run with pnpm dlx on 2026-05-04.
permitted_uses: Local developer-tooling guidance for whether Ant Design CLI should become an advisory or blocking OpenClinXR admin UI check.
claims_supported: @ant-design/cli 6.3.7 is available as an MIT-licensed package.
The package-managed CLI can inspect the admin app environment and detect antd 6.3.7, React 19.2.5, Vite 8.0.10, TypeScript 6.0.3, and pnpm 10.33.0.
The package-managed CLI doctor command reports no failures for apps/ui-admin and one SSR-only warning about @ant-design/cssinjs.
The package-managed CLI can return structured exact-version Button component metadata for Ant Design 6.3.7.
The package-managed CLI lint command is not yet suitable as a blocking gate because it failed locally with ERR_REQUIRE_ESM in a transient oxc-parser dependency path.
claims_not_supported: That Ant Design CLI lint is stable enough to add to pnpm verify.
That Ant Design CLI output replaces Vitest, typecheck, accessibility checks, visual review, or browser verification.
